allow: PowerShell($ua = "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/130.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"; curl.exe -s -A $ua -o "$env:TEMP\\anidb-titles-test.gz" -w "anime-titles.dat.gz: %{http_code} \(size: %{size_download}\)`n" "http://anidb.net/api/anime-titles.dat.gz"; if \(Test-Path "$env:TEMP\\anidb-titles-test.gz"\) { $size = \(Get-Item "$env:TEMP\\anidb-titles-test.gz"\).Length; "saved $size bytes"; Remove-Item "$env:TEMP\\anidb-titles-test.gz" })

PowerShell(curl.exe -s -o "$env:TEMP\\anidb-api-test.txt" -w "api endpoint: %{http_code} \(size: %{size_download}\)`n" "http://api.anidb.net:9001/httpapi?request=anime&aid=7206&client=test&clientver=1&protover=1"; if \(Test-Path "$env:TEMP\\anidb-api-test.txt"\) { $first = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\anidb-api-test.txt" -TotalCount 3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "first lines:"; $first; Remove-Item "$env:TEMP\\anidb-api-test.txt" })

PowerShell($ua = "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/130.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"; curl.exe -sL -A $ua -o "$env:TEMP\\ddg-test.html" -w "ddg: %{http_code} \(size: %{size_download}\)`n" "https://html.duckduckgo.com/html/?q=fate+stay+night+unlimited+blade+works+site%3Aanidb.net%2Fanime")
